question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्यासाठी, प्रत्येक जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि प्रसूती व बाल कल्याण केंद्रांची एकूण संख्या यांची यादी करा, ही यादी एकूण संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा आणि फक्त पहिले ५ जिल्हे दर्शवा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T1.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.district_name,
    SUM(mcc.number_of_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres) AS total_centers
FROM 
    dim_state s
JOIN 
    dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
JOIN 
    fact_maternity_child_care mcc ON sd.sub_district_id = mcc.sub_district_id
WHERE 
    s.state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY 
    d.district_name
ORDER BY 
    total_centers DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.district_name,
    SUM(mcc.number_of_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres) AS total_centers
FROM 
    dim_state s
JOIN 
    dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
JOIN 
    fact_maternity_child_care mcc ON sd.sub_district_id = mcc.sub_district_id
WHERE 
    s.state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY 
    d.district_name
ORDER BY 
    total_centers DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: भारतातील पहिल्या ५ जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि तेथील बाल कल्याण केंद्रांची एकूण संख्या यांची यादी द्या, जी बाल कल्याण केंद्रांच्या एकूण संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावलेली असेल.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T5 ON T4.COUNTRY_ID = T5.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T5.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    d.district_name,
    SUM(fmc.number_of_child_welfare_centres) AS total_child_welfare_centers
FROM 
    dim_sub_district s
JOIN 
    fact_maternity_child_care fmc ON s.sub_district_id = fmc.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_district d ON s.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    dim_state st ON d.state_id = st.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_country co ON st.country_id = co.country_id
WHERE 
    co.country_name = 'India'
GROUP BY 
    d.district_id, d.district_name
ORDER BY 
    total_child_welfare_centers DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: 'North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool' आणि 'South Andamans' नावाच्या जिल्ह्यांसाठी जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि उप-जिल्हा आयडींची (sub-district IDs) संख्या सूचीबद्ध करा, त्यांचे जिल्ह्यांच्या नावानुसार गट करा आणि उप-जिल्हा आयडींच्या संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावून फक्त पहिले ५ निकाल दर्शवा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans') GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(*) AS sub_district_count
FROM DIM_DISTRICT d
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
WHERE d.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans'])
GROUP BY d.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY sub_district_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT d.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(*) AS sub_district_count
FROM DIM_DISTRICT d
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
WHERE d.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans'])
GROUP BY d.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY sub_district_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: प्रत्येक राज्य आयडीसाठी (state ID), राज्य आयडी आणि त्याच्याशी संबंधित उप-जिल्ह्यांच्या नावांची एकूण संख्या द्या.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_ID, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_ID
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    s.STATE_ID, 
    COUNT(sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) AS total_sub_districts
FROM 
    DIM_STATE s
JOIN 
    DIM_DISTRICT d ON s.STATE_ID = d.STATE_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
GROUP BY 
    s.STATE_ID;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    s.STATE_ID, 
    COUNT(sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) AS total_sub_districts
FROM 
    DIM_STATE s
JOIN 
    DIM_DISTRICT d ON s.STATE_ID = d.STATE_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
GROUP BY 
    s.STATE_ID;

    s.state_name, 
    COUNT(sd.sub_district_id) AS total_sub_districts
FROM 
    dim_state s
JOIN 
    dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
GROUP BY 
    s.state_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sub_districts DESC;

question: 'अंदमान आणि निकोबार बेटे' आणि 'आसाम' या राज्यांसाठी प्रत्येक राज्याचे नाव आणि उप-जिल्ह्यांच्या नावांची एकूण संख्या यांची यादी द्या, राज्याच्या नावानुसार गटबद्ध करा आणि उप-जिल्ह्यांच्या संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME IN ('Andaman And Nicobar Islands', 'Assam') GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dim_state.state_name, 
    COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS total_sub_districts
FROM 
    dim_sub_district
JOIN 
    dim_district ON dim_sub_district.district_id = dim_district.district_id
JOIN 
    dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE 
    dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' 
    OR dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'assam'
GROUP BY 
    dim_state.state_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sub_districts DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dim_state.state_name, 
    COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS total_sub_districts
FROM 
    dim_sub_district
JOIN 
    dim_district ON dim_sub_district.district_id = dim_district.district_id
JOIN 
    dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE 
    dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' 
    OR dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'assam'
GROUP BY 
    dim_state.state_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sub_districts DESC;
